props.ChoiceText: After you had directed enough people, the house itself seemed arranged around your habits, timings, and assumptions.
props.ChoiceBio: When the house remembered your order, service and rule became difficult to distinguish.

0.TransitionText: Because the house remembering your order taught you how difficult service and rule can be to distinguish, household authority remained your daily craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TargetText: Those who live by the rhythms of the house still fall back into patterns you taught them.
1.TransitionText: Because the house remembering your order taught you how difficult service and rule can be to distinguish, household authority remained your daily craft.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Steward, but you may remain on your current path instead.

0.TargetText: Someone now treats your household favor as though it can move their whole future.
